title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 044
task1_desc: You are given a string **"123456789"**. Write a script that would insert **"+"** or **"-"** in between digits so that when you evaluate, the result should be **100**.
task1_body: You are given a string **"123456789"**. Write a script that would insert **"+"** or **"-"** in between digits so that when you evaluate, the result should be **100**.
task2_desc: You have only $1 left at the start of the week. You have been given an opportunity to make it $200. The rule is simple with every move you can either **double** what you have or add another $1. Write a script to help you get $200 with the smallest number of moves.
task2_body:
You have only $1 left at the start of the week. You have been given an opportunity to make it $200. The rule is simple with every move you can either **double** what you have or add another $1. Write a script to help you get $200 with the smallest number of moves.

Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 26th January 2020**.
